title: Local Approval Live-Gate Preflight Export
objective: Add a browser-local approval live-gate preflight export that wraps the PM Lane 146 review bundle with final no-write preflight status before any later explicit live approval admission.
scope: Add an Export Live Gate Preflight action to the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel.

Download one JSON artifact that includes the PM Lane 146 review bundle, preflight status counts, candidate identity, approval-status readback, admission no-go posture, live-write gate status, required PM Lane 142 phrase, and blocked downstream boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded preflight artifact and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.
No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

live_write_gate.required_phrase: I explicitly admit PM Lane 142 live approval POST and first approval-row creation for the current Project Miner Temp Power import candidate.
live_write_gate.note: This phrase was not present for PM Lane 147, so the lane remains local live-gate preflight export only.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 147|Export Live Gate Preflight|approval-live-gate-preflight|pm_lane_147_local_live_gate_preflight_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 147/live-gate-preflight/zero-mutation evidence plus NETA Topic Spine/TCC parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Desktop Codex returned untracked NETA Topic Spine artifacts while PM Lane 147 was in progress. The comparative-audit closeout is preliminarily classified as a clean READY_FOR_JASON_DECISION artifact; a later topic-spine design closeout also appeared. Both are intentionally held for separate technical-authority review and are not staged into this PM lane.
next_recommended_lane: PM lane may either pause at the local live-gate preflight and wait for explicit PM Lane 142 live-write admission, or continue local field-execution readiness ergonomics without opening approval POST or import mutation.
